overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic urban environment with neon signage, passing from a sidewalk into a hotel plaza and through a dark underpass. The scene features a mix of modern concrete architecture and cyberpunk neon aesthetics with clear morning lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with commercial neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past buildings with neon signs

entered.detail: green glowing neon sign on building facade
tall skyscraper with large purple neon signage
concrete staircase leading up to building entrance
metal safety railing along the sidewalk edge
sloped concrete ramp adjacent to stairs

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk next to a building with a green neon sign, with the tall Kabuki building visible in the distance. The path leads past concrete stairs and ramps in an open urban environment with sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: hotel entrance plaza with abandoned vehicles

events.description: moving from narrow sidewalk into open hotel plaza area
turning right to cross the empty street toward the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the hotel plaza and crossing the street toward the parking structure

entered.detail: multi-story building with illuminated entrance signage reading The Kinko Hotel
tall vertical red neon sign with Japanese characters
large concrete parking structure with multiple levels
derelict cars parked near the hotel entrance

segments.scene_description: Entering the open plaza in front of the Kinko Hotel with its prominent Japanese neon signage. The camera passes abandoned vehicles and turns to cross the street, with a large multi-story parking garage becoming visible on the right while the Kabuki tower shifts to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass beneath concrete structure

events.description: entering the dark shadow of the concrete overpass
moving deeper into the underpass with bright exit visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark underpass toward the distant light

entered.detail: massive concrete ceiling and pillars of the highway overpass
bright daylight visible at the far end of the underpass
short yellow-topped posts lining the path edge

segments.scene_description: Moving into a dark, covered underpass beneath the parking garage structure. The lighting shifts dramatically to low light as the camera proceeds through the tunnel-like space toward a bright exit in the distance, with concrete pillars and bollards lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bright, open urban sidewalk into the oppressive shadows of a concrete underpass. It begins by walking along a concrete path beside a building with a green neon sign, keeping the distant Kabuki tower in view while passing sparse vegetation and ramps. As the camera enters the open plaza in front of the Kinko Hotel, the scene expands to reveal abandoned vehicles and a massive multi-story parking garage that looms on the right. The perspective then shifts as the camera crosses the street and moves directly into the dark, covered space beneath the garage structure. Finally, the lighting drops dramatically, transitioning into a tunnel-like environment lined with concrete pillars and bollards that leads toward a bright exit in the distance.
